3092030.name: Fantasy Grounds - Glaive of the Revenant King
3092030.description:
Glaive of the Revenant King

pages of mystery, war, and dangerous dungeons.
Deep within the dark recesses of the
Tomb of Nihalar , the final resting place of elven kings, the weapon of the wood elves of
Imfe Aiqua stirs. Two individuals are drawn to the weapon--but only one can accept it. Who will take up the glaive of the revenant king and become the ruler of the forgotten elven city?
Glaive of the Revenant King is a 3rd-level Fifth Edition adventure for
3-5 characters . Characters who survive the adventure should reach the
4th level by the adventure's conclusion. This is the major side quest in the
Hand of Eight adventure path. It can be played as the kickoff for the larger adventure setting or as a short adventure for your players. The campaign is intended to be set in the DMDave crowdsourced campaign world of
Omeria . However, it can just as easily be inserted into any other mysterious, untamed wilderness.
The adventure is written by renown Fifth Edition author, DMDave Hamrick. It's pages of fast-paced fantasy adventure that includes zombie hordes, horrible monsters in dark forests, battles with orcs, and tombs filled with dangerous traps.

Glaive Information

  • A 2-3 session adventure for 3rd level characters
  • All book assets and information fully integrated, including new maps for the City of Barnemouth, the Hex Map for Ayas Kelren, and a oversized Swamp Map for Encounters.
  • 35 monsters and NPCs (24 SRD Monsters/NPCs, 6 New Original Monsters, and 5 Named NPCs) each with token artwork.
  • Item Handout for the Glaive of the Revenant King
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Steven Daord
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included 5E Compatible ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
